response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video, detected introductory banter (00:00-01:19), performance of 'Doki Doki Kyun! de Daibousou♡' (01:19-04:30), and outro banter (04:30-05:00). 2. response.global_summary: The video features an introductory conversation between Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, Shirakami Fubuki, Fuwawa Abyssgard, and Mococo Abyssgard, followed by their performance of the song 'Doki Doki Kyun! de Daibousou♡' composed by Ichou. The video concludes with some closing banter.

scenes.description: The song 'Doki Doki Kyun! de Daibousou♡' is performed by Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, Shirakami Fubuki, Fuwawa Abyssgard, and Mococo Abyssgard. The song is composed by Ichou. The performers dance on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, Shirakami Fubuki, Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Doki Doki Kyun! Okuru Rabu Biimu
Kimi o muchuu ni saseru koi no aji

Nanto ka shinakucha nara nakute
Totsuzen meido ni nac chatte
Itsumo no you ni omise no souji
Tobira hirai chatte me ga atta?
Nandaka isogashiku nac chatte
Awa tenbou ni mo nac chatte,
O shigoto chuu ni! Oshi ni muchuu ni!
Doko o sagashite mo mia tara nai jan!

Mou ii kai?
Chotto matte
Mou ii yo!
Himitsu dayo ne?
Mou ii no?
Suki ni nac chatte
Nee,
Suki tte itte!

Doki Doki Kyun! Okuru Rabu Biimu
Kimi o muchuu ni saseru mahou jan?
Hora Doki Doki Kyun! Watashi dai bousou
Kimi o muchuu ni saseru koi no aji
Mou kimi ni kyun watashi dai mou sou
Kimi to muchuu ni nareru mahou jan!?
Dakara kimi ga kyun tte naru koi ni
Natte
Hitotsu douzo kore ga koi no aji!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Doki Doki Kyun! Sending love beams
Making you addicted, it's the taste of love

Need to do something, suddenly turned into a maid
Cleaning the shop as always, door opened and our eyes met?
It became a bit busy, became a bit clumsy too
During work, addicted to my crush, can't find them anywhere!

Are you there yet? Wait a moment
Are you there yet? It's a secret, you know?
Are you there yet? I fell in love
Hey, say you love me!

Doki Doki Kyun! Sending love beams
Making you addicted, it's the taste of love
Look, Doki Doki Kyun! My big rampage
Making you addicted, it's the taste of love
I'm already addicted to you, my big rampage
Making you addicted, it's the magic, isn't it?!
So, fall into the love that makes you go 'Kyun!'
Here, take it, this is the taste of love!

scenes.description: The song ends, and the VTubers engage in some post-performance banter before the video finishes.
scenes.performer_in_video: Kobo Kanaeru, Sakura Miko, Shirakami Fubuki, Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard
